entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`row_id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `provider_kind` INTEGER NOT NULL, `provider_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `provider_thread_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `timestamp_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sent_timestamp_ms` INTEGER, `direction` INTEGER NOT NULL, `message_box` TEXT NOT NULL, `message_status` TEXT NOT NULL, `subscription_id` INTEGER, `sender_address` TEXT, `body` TEXT, `subject` TEXT, `attachment_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `attachment_type_summary` TEXT NOT NULL, `attachment_total_bytes` INTEGER, `is_read` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_seen` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_locked` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sync_fingerprint` TEXT NOT NULL, `searchable_text` TEXT NOT NULL, `last_seen_generation` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_provider_kind_provider_id
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_provider_kind_provider_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`provider_kind`, `provider_id`)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_provider_thread_id_timestamp_ms_row_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_provider_thread_id_timestamp_ms_row_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`provider_thread_id` ASC, `timestamp_ms` DESC, `row_id` DESC)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_timestamp_ms_row_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_timestamp_ms_row_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp_ms` DESC, `row_id` DESC)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_sender_address_timestamp_ms_row_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_sender_address_timestamp_ms_row_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sender_address` ASC, `timestamp_ms` DESC, `row_id` DESC)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_subscription_id_timestamp_ms_row_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_subscription_id_timestamp_ms_row_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`subscription_id` ASC, `timestamp_ms` DESC, `row_id` DESC)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_is_read_timestamp_ms_row_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_is_read_timestamp_ms_row_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`is_read` ASC, `timestamp_ms` DESC, `row_id` DESC)

indices.name: index_indexed_messages_provider_kind_last_seen_generation
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_indexed_messages_provider_kind_last_seen_generation` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`provider_kind`, `last_seen_generation`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`body` TEXT, `subject` TEXT, `searchable_text` TEXT NOT NULL, tokenize=unicode61, content=`indexed_messages`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_indexed_messages_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `indexed_messages` BEGIN DELETE FROM `indexed_messages_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_indexed_messages_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `indexed_messages` BEGIN DELETE FROM `indexed_messages_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_indexed_messages_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `indexed_messages` BEGIN INSERT INTO `indexed_messages_fts`(`docid`, `body`, `subject`, `searchable_text`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`body`, NEW.`subject`, NEW.`searchable_text`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_indexed_messages_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `indexed_messages` BEGIN INSERT INTO `indexed_messages_fts`(`docid`, `body`, `subject`, `searchable_text`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`body`, NEW.`subject`, NEW.`searchable_text`); END

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`generation_id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `state` INTEGER NOT NULL, `started_at_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, `completed_at_ms` INTEGER, `committed_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pending_changes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `failure_code` INTEGER, `target_batch_size` INTEGER NOT NULL, `signal_sequence` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_index_generations_state
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_index_generations_state` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`state`)

indices.name: index_index_generations_updated_at_ms
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_index_generations_updated_at_ms` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`updated_at_ms`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`generation_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `provider_kind` INTEGER NOT NULL, `cursor_timestamp_ms` INTEGER, `cursor_provider_id` INTEGER, `exhausted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `committed_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, `verified_provider_count` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`generation_id`, `provider_kind`))

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
